overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from a covered pedestrian walkway with holographic billboards, across a sunlit intersection, and through commercial and industrial districts with neon signage and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with holographic advertising displays

events.description: blue sedan drives past on the left side of the walkway
begins crossing the street at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along covered sidewalk beneath overhead structure, observing holographic advertisements on right wall

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving along the street parallel to walkway

entered.detail: overhead metal and concrete structure with industrial beams covering the pedestrian walkway
large curved wall with multiple animated holographic advertisements and neon displays
blue and red neon sign with GIRUS text hanging over the walkway
distinctive orange tiled pedestrian pavement with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian walkway in a cyberpunk city, with holographic billboards lining the right wall and an orange tiled floor. The overhead industrial structure blocks most of the sky while a blue car passes on the left. The camera approaches an intersection and begins to cross.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit urban intersection with crosswalks and traffic

events.description: exits covered walkway into open sunlit intersection with direct sunlight
white sedan drives through the intersection ahead
turns right to follow the sidewalk along the new street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street through yellow crosswalk markings, then turning right to continue along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection
person in red shirt and shorts crossing the street ahead of camera

entered.detail: multi-story brick building with green awning and closed metal shutters
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with WAIT text
traffic sign indicating speed limit 40 mounted on orange pole

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into bright sunlight at an urban intersection. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk as a white sedan drives through and a pedestrian in red crosses ahead. Turning right, the scene reveals brick buildings with green awnings and moderate traffic flow.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with auto shops and vertical neon signage

events.description: enters covered commercial corridor with storefronts and neon signs
waits at crosswalk as vehicles pass before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking along commercial sidewalk passing auto parts stores and neon signs, pausing at intersections

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green storefront with red AUTOPARTS signage and service bay doors
tall vertical pink neon sign with Japanese characters
covered bus stop with bench and advertising poster on the side

segments.scene_description: Walking through a commercial district with an autoparts store on the left and vertical neon signs on the right. The overhead structure creates a mix of sun and shadow. The camera passes a bus stop shelter and waits at a crosswalk with other pedestrians before continuing along the orange-tiled sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial area transitioning to open city view with distant skyscrapers

events.description: area opens up revealing distant city skyline with skyscrapers and palm trees
slight turn to follow the curving sidewalk path

agents.ego_description: walking past industrial buildings with external fire escapes toward a more open area with visible skyscrapers in the distance

notable_agents.action: shirtless person walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: metal external fire escape stairs attached to brick building facade
tall modern glass skyscraper visible in the distance beyond the street
large horizontal billboard with GIRUS advertisement and product display

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to an industrial area with metal fire escapes on brick buildings. The street opens up to reveal distant skyscrapers and palm trees under a clear sky. The camera passes parked cars and a large GIRUS billboard while following the sidewalk curve toward the open city vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered, holographic pedestrian corridor into the expansive, sun-drenched streets of a futuristic industrial district. It begins within a covered walkway featuring orange tiled floors and glowing billboards, moving past a blue car toward the edge of the structure. As the camera emerges from the shade, the scene opens into a bright urban intersection where the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst flowing traffic and pedestrians. The path then shifts into a commercial district characterized by a mix of sun and shadow, passing neon signage and an autoparts store before continuing along the orange sidewalk. Finally, the environment transitions into an industrial area with brick buildings and metal fire escapes, curving past a large GIRUS billboard to reveal a wide vista of distant skyscrapers and palm trees under a clear sky.
